note: Plan -> PBM -> formulary index for states not yet carrying drug-level data in the app. MA and MD are generated from src/data/formulary.json. Formulary URLs were fetched live on the capture date (fetchedOk).

states.name: New York
states.note: Pharmacy is carved OUT of mainstream Medicaid managed care into one statewide FFS program (NYRx) since 4/1/2023, so the Medicaid MCOs share the single NYRx PDL.

plans.name: NYRx — NYS Medicaid Pharmacy Program (Fee-for-Service)
plans.pbm: Magellan Medicaid Administration (Prime Therapeutics; NYRx fiscal agent / PDP administrator)
plans.formularyLabel: NYRx Preferred Drug List (PDP PDL)

plans.name: Healthfirst (Medicaid Managed Care / PHSP) — largest NY Medicaid MCO
plans.pbm: None at plan level — pharmacy benefit carved out to NYRx (Magellan Medicaid Administration)
plans.formularyLabel: NYRx Preferred Drug List (Healthfirst Medicaid Rx is administered by NYRx)

plans.name: Fidelis Care (Medicaid Managed Care) — 2nd largest NY Medicaid MCO
plans.pbm: None at plan level — pharmacy benefit carved out to NYRx (Magellan Medicaid Administration)

plans.name: MetroPlus Health Plan (Medicaid Managed Care) — 3rd largest NYC Medicaid MCO
plans.pbm: None at plan level — pharmacy benefit carved out to NYRx (Magellan Medicaid Administration)
plans.formularyLabel: NYRx Preferred Drug List (MetroPlus Medicaid Rx is administered by NYRx)

states.name: Pennsylvania
states.note: Medical Assistance (Medicaid) FFS, HealthChoices, and Community HealthChoices (CHC) MCOs ALL follow one Statewide Preferred Drug List (papdl.com) with identical preferred agents and PA criteria — the MCOs may add a Supplemental Formulary for non-PDL drugs but never override a PDL preference. Physical HealthChoices runs in 5 regional zones (Southeast/Southwest/Lehigh-Capital/Northwest/Northeast); most MCOs cover multiple zones.

plans.name: PA Medical Assistance Statewide Preferred Drug List (Fee-for-Service)
plans.pbm: OptumRx, Inc. (negotiates supplemental rebates / P&T support for DHS)
plans.formularyLabel: PA Statewide Preferred Drug List (PDL)

plans.name: Keystone First (HealthChoices Medicaid MCO) — AmeriHealth Caritas, largest Southeast zone MCO
plans.pbm: PerformRx — follows the PA Statewide PDL
plans.formularyLabel: PA Statewide PDL (Keystone First follows DHS PDL + Supplemental Formulary)

plans.name: UPMC for You, Inc. (HealthChoices Medicaid MCO) — all 5 zones
plans.pbm: Express Scripts (ESI) — follows the PA Statewide PDL
plans.formularyLabel: PA Statewide PDL (UPMC for You follows DHS PDL + Supplemental Formulary)

plans.name: PA Health and Wellness (HealthChoices Medicaid MCO) — Centene, all 5 zones
plans.pbm: Express Scripts — follows the PA Statewide PDL
plans.formularyLabel: PA Statewide PDL (PA Health and Wellness follows DHS PDL + Supplemental Formulary)

plans.name: AmeriHealth Caritas Community HealthChoices (CHC) — dual-eligible / LTSS MCO
plans.pbm: PerformRx — follows the PA Statewide PDL
plans.formularyLabel: PA Statewide PDL (AmeriHealth Caritas CHC follows DHS PDL + Supplemental Formulary)

plans.name: Independence Blue Cross (Commercial) — dominant Southeast PA / Philadelphia carrier
plans.formularyLabel: IBX Select Drug Program® Formulary

plans.name: Highmark Blue Cross Blue Shield (Commercial) — dominant Western & Central PA carrier
plans.pbm: Prime Therapeutics (Highmark is a Prime owner-member Blue plan)
plans.formularyLabel: Highmark BCBS Commercial Drug Formulary (Essential / Comprehensive)

states.name: Alabama
states.note: Genuinely simpler than every other state indexed so far: Alabama Medicaid runs almost entirely Fee-for-Service with NO managed care organization contracts for the general adult population (confirmed via live search, not assumed) — one statewide PDL, updated quarterly (Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct), administered directly by the Alabama Medicaid Agency rather than through a named contracted PBM.

plans.name: Alabama Medicaid Agency Preferred Drug List (Fee-for-Service, statewide — no MCO contracts)
plans.pbm: Administered directly by the Alabama Medicaid Agency, Clinical Services and Support Division (no contracted PBM identified)
plans.formularyLabel: Alabama Medicaid Agency Preferred Drug List (PDL Reference Tool, quarterly)

plans.name: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Alabama (Commercial) — dominant statewide carrier
plans.formularyLabel: BCBS Alabama Standardized Source+Rx 4-Tier Prescription Drug List

plans.name: BCBS Alabama Blue Advantage (Medicare Advantage / Part D)
plans.formularyLabel: Blue Advantage Choice 2026 Formulary (List of Covered Drugs)

states.name: California
states.note: Pharmacy is carved OUT of Medi-Cal managed care into one statewide FFS carve-out, Medi-Cal Rx (DHCS-run, Magellan Health as vendor/PBM), since 1/1/2022 — same NYRx-style consolidation pattern as New York. Every Medi-Cal MCO's members use the Medi-Cal Rx Contract Drugs List (CDL) regardless of which plan they're enrolled in, so ONE Medicaid entry covers the whole state. Confirmed live: denosumab (Prolia/biosimilars), romosozumab (Evenity), and teriparatide (Forteo) are all covered as Medi-Cal Rx PHARMACY-benefit line items with PA criteria — not carved to medical-only — so a CA osteoporosis guide can cover all 5 classes.

plans.name: Medi-Cal Rx — California Medicaid Pharmacy Program (Fee-for-Service carve-out, statewide)
plans.pbm: Magellan Health (Magellan Medicaid Administration; DHCS vendor)
plans.formularyLabel: Medi-Cal Rx Contract Drugs List (CDL)

plans.name: Kaiser Permanente (Commercial HMO) — largest integrated CA commercial carrier
plans.pbm: Internal (Kaiser Foundation Health Plan formulary; closed integrated pharmacy)
plans.formularyLabel: Kaiser Permanente 2026 California Commercial HMO Formulary

plans.name: Anthem Blue Cross of California (Commercial)
plans.formularyLabel: Anthem Blue Cross California Drug List (Select Drug List)
